LAW AND MOTION 301, ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND NOTICE OF HEARING. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT HAVING HEARD TESTIMONY, REVIEWED THE PAPERS ON FILE HEREIN DENIED MR. WALLS APPLICATION FOR A WRIT OF POSSESSION -- INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT TO THIS RELIEF. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: LEE BATARA CSR#3759

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Claimant ENNIS WALLS in propria persona moving to seek a writ of possession
Patricia Caldwell, Esq. of the Law Offices of TODD ROTHBARD 408/244-4200 for Plaintiff and opposing party
* The following witnesses were sworn. Mr. Walls was sworn and testified on his own behalf.
DAVID SOLIS, Accountant was sworn and testified on behalf of the Plaintiff.
The Court having heard testimony, reviewed the papers on file herein DENIED Mr. Walls application for a writ of possession -- insufficient evidence to support to this relief.
Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (AJR/301) Lee Batara, CSR 3759
